{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Maintenance Engineer",
  "description": "Seven-Up Bottling Company Limited is one of the largest manufacturing companies in Nigeria, producing and distributing some of the nation&rsquo;s most- loved beverages in the country like; Pepsi, 7Up, Mirinda, Teem, Mountain Dew, H2oH!, Lipton Ice Tea and Aquafina premium drinking water. SBC has recently entered into Home &amp; Personal Care category with the 2SURE brand and launched its first product, a Hand &amp; Surface Sanitizer. Seven Up boasts of nine bottling plants with state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities strategically located across various regions in the country.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Maintenance Engineer

Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary


	The Asset Care Manager will be responsible for developing and executing the plant maintenance strategies in accordance to global best practices to ensure asset reliability and availability within the best optimum cost.


Job Responsibilities
Strive:


	Establishes, monitors and reinforces control on maintenance strategy execution in plant in alignment with manufacturing strategy
	Organises and schedules annual overhaul of production lines and facilities
	Improves efficiencies by increasing preventive maintenance across the plant and to minimise breakdowns and reduce mean time between failures.
	Develops business plans providing productivity improvement and stretchy targets for cost efficiency
	Prepares and controls annual plant maintenance budget ensuring sufficient funds to cover all routines and initiatives reflected in strategy &amp; operational plans.
	Ensures optimal spare parts and maintenance materials inventory management
	Ensures continuous and effective assets management
	Actively participates and ensures the implementation of various infrastructure or process optimisation projects
	Evaluates effectiveness of corrective actions using all available data
	Maintains effective systems to ensure SBC/PI products and package quality.


Accountabilities


	Ensures implementation of basic cycle maintenance, lubrication, cleaning and inspection (CIL) and instill these principles to be part of the culture of operators and technicians.
	Ensures proper upkeep and prevent loss of the tools and equipment in the engineering department.
	Take lead in change management for the engineering/maintenance department related to people structure or role changes, technology


Requirements


	Bachelor of Engineering Degree (B.Eng.) or HND in Mechanical/Electrical Engineering.
	Must have 8&ndash; 10 years of relevant hands-on FMCG operation and maintenance experience.
	At least 3 years of experience in a beverage bottling company in a managerial capacity.
	Experienced in budgeting and people management


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@sevenup.org using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-16",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Seven Up Bottling Company Plc"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

      "maxValue": 0,

    }

Maintenance Engineer Job at Seven Up Bottling Company Plc




        
    

        
        Seven-Up Bottling Company Limited is one of the largest manufacturing companies in Nigeria, producing and distributing some of the nation’s most- loved beverages in the country like; Pepsi, 7Up, Mirinda, Teem, Mountain Dew, H2oH!, Lipton Ice Tea and Aquafina premium drinking water. SBC has recently entered into Home & Personal Care category with the 2SURE brand and launched its first product, a Hand & Surface Sanitizer. Seven Up boasts of nine bottling plants with state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities strategically located across various regions in the country.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Maintenance Engineer

Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Asset Care Manager will be responsible for developing and executing the plant maintenance strategies in accordance to global best practices to ensure asset reliability and availability within the best optimum cost.


Job Responsibilities
Strive:


	Establishes, monitors and reinforces control on maintenance strategy execution in plant in alignment with manufacturing strategy
	Organises and schedules annual overhaul of production lines and facilities
	Improves efficiencies by increasing preventive maintenance across the plant and to minimise breakdowns and reduce mean time between failures.
	Develops business plans providing productivity improvement and stretchy targets for cost efficiency
	Prepares and controls annual plant maintenance budget ensuring sufficient funds to cover all routines and initiatives reflected in strategy & operational plans.
	Ensures optimal spare parts and maintenance materials inventory management
	Ensures continuous and effective assets management
	Actively participates and ensures the implementation of various infrastructure or process optimisation projects
	Evaluates effectiveness of corrective actions using all available data
	Maintains effective systems to ensure SBC/PI products and package quality.


Accountabilities


	Ensures implementation of basic cycle maintenance, lubrication, cleaning and inspection (CIL) and instill these principles to be part of the culture of operators and technicians.
	Ensures proper upkeep and prevent loss of the tools and equipment in the engineering department.
	Take lead in change management for the engineering/maintenance department related to people structure or role changes, technology


Requirements


	Bachelor of Engineering Degree (B.Eng.) or HND in Mechanical/Electrical Engineering.
	Must have 8– 10 years of relevant hands-on FMCG operation and maintenance experience.
	At least 3 years of experience in a beverage bottling company in a managerial capacity.
	Experienced in budgeting and people management


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Operations Administrative Assistant",
  "description": "Home Bargains Nigeria Limited is a gift and decor store situated in Abuja, Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Administrative Assistant
Job Location: Wuse Zone 1,&nbsp; Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Retail &ndash; Home D&eacute;cor, Kitchenware, Gifts, Cards, Kids Items, Consumables

Job Summary


	The Admin Assistant will provide essential administrative support, ensure smooth office processes,assistin documentation management, maintain communication flow, and support the Admin Officer in daily operational tasks.


Key Responsibilities
Administrative Support:


	Assisting coordinating daily administrative operations.
	Support the Admin Officer in managing administrative tasks andworkflows.
	Maintain office policies, procedures, and documentation systems.


Operational Support:


	Assisting ensuring store organization, cleanliness, and operational compliance.
	Coordinate with departments to support daily store activities.
	Help track staff attendance, schedules, and general documentation.


Documentation &amp; Reporting:


	Prepare basic administrative reports including daily logs and updates.
	Maintainfiling systems (digital and physical).
	Update internal databases and records accurately.


Procurement &amp; Inventory:


	Monitor office supplies and notify when restocking isrequired.
	Assisting liaising with suppliers for routine materials and service needs.


Communication:


	Serve as a support contact between staff, management, and external partners.
	Draft emails, notices, and internal communications as directed.
	Assisting handling customer feedback and routing issues appropriately.


Digital &amp; System Management:


	Support website and admin platform updates.
	Ensure proper data entry and digital record maintenance.


Personal Attributes


	Excellent organizational and multitasking abilities
	Strong attention to detail
	Good communicationand interpersonal skills
	Proactive and reliable
	Ability to work under pressure
	Professional and respectful attitude


Required Skills:


	Organizational &amp; time?management skills
	Attention to detail &amp; multitasking ability
	Good communicationskills
	Documentation &amp; reporting skills
	Basic procurement &amp; inventory support skills
	Digital/data entry skills
	In?depth knowledge of Microsoft Office Suite


Requirements


	B.S.c Degree / HND in Business Administration or related field
	2 &ndash;3 years of experience in an administrative role
	Strong organizational and time-management skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite
	Ability to work independently and follow instructions


Work Schedule:


	4 days per week (9:00 AM &ndash; 6:00 PM)
	2 compulsory Sundays per month.





Salary
N100,000 Monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: ad.homebargains@gmail.com using &ldquo;Admin Assistant&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Operations Administrative Assistant Job at Home Bargains Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Home Bargains Nigeria Limited is a gift and decor store situated in Abuja, Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Administrative Assistant
Job Location: Wuse Zone 1,  Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Retail – Home Décor, Kitchenware, Gifts, Cards, Kids Items, Consumables

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Admin Assistant will provide essential administrative support, ensure smooth office processes,assistin documentation management, maintain communication flow, and support the Admin Officer in daily operational tasks.


Key Responsibilities
Administrative Support:


	Assisting coordinating daily administrative operations.
	Support the Admin Officer in managing administrative tasks andworkflows.
	Maintain office policies, procedures, and documentation systems.


Operational Support:


	Assisting ensuring store organization, cleanliness, and operational compliance.
	Coordinate with departments to support daily store activities.
	Help track staff attendance, schedules, and general documentation.


Documentation & Reporting:


	Prepare basic administrative reports including daily logs and updates.
	Maintainfiling systems (digital and physical).
	Update internal databases and records accurately.


Procurement & Inventory:


	Monitor office supplies and notify when restocking isrequired.
	Assisting liaising with suppliers for routine materials and service needs.


Communication:


	Serve as a support contact between staff, management, and external partners.
	Draft emails, notices, and internal communications as directed.
	Assisting handling customer feedback and routing issues appropriately.


Digital & System Management:


	Support website and admin platform updates.
	Ensure proper data entry and digital record maintenance.


Personal Attributes


	Excellent organizational and multitasking abilities
	Strong attention to detail
	Good communicationand interpersonal skills
	Proactive and reliable
	Ability to work under pressure
	Professional and respectful attitude


Required Skills:


	Organizational & time?management skills
	Attention to detail & multitasking ability
	Good communicationskills
	Documentation & reporting skills
	Basic procurement & inventory support skills
	Digital/data entry skills
	In?depth knowledge of Microsoft Office Suite


Requirements


	B.S.c Degree / HND in Business Administration or related field
	2 –3 years of experience in an administrative role
	Strong organizational and time-management skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite
	Ability to work independently and follow instructions


Work Schedule:


	4 days per week (9:00 AM – 6:00 PM)
	2 compulsory Sundays per month.





Salary
N100,000 Monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: [email protected] using “Admin Assistant” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager / Content Creator",
  "description": "Taeillo is a modern Nigerian furniture design and manufacturing company that specializes in creating stylish, affordable, and space-saving furniture for homes and offices. The brand operates with a strong e-commerce model, allowing customers to browse, customize, and order furniture online with seamless delivery services across Nigeria and beyond.

Taeillo focuses on combining contemporary African-inspired design with functionality, targeting young professionals, urban homeowners, and businesses looking for premium yet accessible interior solutions. The company is known for its innovative approach to furniture retail, fast-growing online presence, and commitment to quality craftsmanship.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager / Content Creator
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a creative, trend-savvy, and results-driven Social Media Manager/Content Creator to manage our digital presence, create engaging content, grow online engagement, and strengthen brand visibility across all social platforms.
	The ideal candidate should be passionate about content creation, social media trends, storytelling, and audience engagement, with the ability to create both strategic and day-to-day content that drives brand awareness and conversions.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute social media content strategies
	Create engaging photo, video, and graphic content for social platforms
	Manage daily posting across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, X, etc.
	Plan and maintain content calendars
	Monitor trends and create relevant real-time content
	Increase audience engagement, followers, and brand visibility
	Collaborate with marketing, sales, and operations teams for campaigns
	Cover events, behind-the-scenes activities, and product promotions
	Track performance metrics and provide monthly reports
	Manage community engagement and respond to messages/comments


Requirements


	2&ndash;4 years of experience in social media management/content creation
	Strong understanding of Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, and social trends
	Skilled in Canva, CapCut, Adobe Suite, or similar tools
	Basic photography/videography and editing skills
	Strong copywriting and storytelling ability
	Creative, proactive, and highly organized
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment


Preferred:


	Experience in e-commerce, lifestyle, furniture, retail, or manufacturing brands
	Ability to create viral/trending content
	Portfolio or social media samples required


Key Skills:


	Content Creation
	Social Media Management
	Video Editing
	Copywriting
	Brand Storytelling
	Community Management
	Trend Analysis
	Digital Marketing
",

Social Media Manager / Content Creator Job at Taeillo Furniture




        
    

        
        Taeillo is a modern Nigerian furniture design and manufacturing company that specializes in creating stylish, affordable, and space-saving furniture for homes and offices. The brand operates with a strong e-commerce model, allowing customers to browse, customize, and order furniture online with seamless delivery services across Nigeria and beyond.

Taeillo focuses on combining contemporary African-inspired design with functionality, targeting young professionals, urban homeowners, and businesses looking for premium yet accessible interior solutions. The company is known for its innovative approach to furniture retail, fast-growing online presence, and commitment to quality craftsmanship.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager / Content Creator
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a creative, trend-savvy, and results-driven Social Media Manager/Content Creator to manage our digital presence, create engaging content, grow online engagement, and strengthen brand visibility across all social platforms.
	The ideal candidate should be passionate about content creation, social media trends, storytelling, and audience engagement, with the ability to create both strategic and day-to-day content that drives brand awareness and conversions.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute social media content strategies
	Create engaging photo, video, and graphic content for social platforms
	Manage daily posting across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, X, etc.
	Plan and maintain content calendars
	Monitor trends and create relevant real-time content
	Increase audience engagement, followers, and brand visibility
	Collaborate with marketing, sales, and operations teams for campaigns
	Cover events, behind-the-scenes activities, and product promotions
	Track performance metrics and provide monthly reports
	Manage community engagement and respond to messages/comments


Requirements


	2–4 years of experience in social media management/content creation
	Strong understanding of Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, and social trends
	Skilled in Canva, CapCut, Adobe Suite, or similar tools
	Basic photography/videography and editing skills
	Strong copywriting and storytelling ability
	Creative, proactive, and highly organized
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment


Preferred:


	Experience in e-commerce, lifestyle, furniture, retail, or manufacturing brands
	Ability to create viral/trending content
	Portfolio or social media samples required


Key Skills:


	Content Creation
	Social Media Management
	Video Editing
	Copywriting
	Brand Storytelling
	Community Management
	Trend Analysis
	Digital Marketing
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Customer Service Representative Job at Tribest Corporate Support Limited




        
    

        
        Tribest is a corporate support solutions provider with a comprehensive range of people outsourcing services. We have a diversified team of management, strategy, banking and capacity development experts working together to provide organizations with the best human resource management solutions. With a team that diverse, we are setting new standards of performance and raising the bar in excellent service delivery.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Lagos

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Bilingual: Able to speak English with any of (Hausa, Igbo, Yoruba)
	Clear and articulate verbal communication.
	Active listening skills to understand customer needs and concerns.
	Have basic proficiency in Microsoft Office suites
	Maximum Age of 35years
	Ability to compose clear and professional written responses.
	Clear and articulate verbal communication.
	Active listening skills to understand customer needs and concerns.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Bank Sales Executive",
  "description": "Tribest is a corporate support solutions provider with a comprehensive range of people outsourcing services. We have a diversified team of management, strategy, banking, and capacity development experts working together to provide organizations with the best human resource management solutions. With a team that diverse, we are setting new standards of performance and raising the bar in excellent service delivery.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Bank Sales Executive

Job Location: Nationwide

Responsibilities


	Develop and execute sales strategies to achieve revenue targets.
	Build and maintain strong business relationships with individual and corporate clients
	Educate clients on product features, benefits, and usage.
	Passionate and hardworking Sales personnel.


Qualification


	HND or B.Sc. Degree
	Experience in Sales is an advantage.
	Age - 35 years and below.


Benefits


	Salary: N113,000(Gross) + Commission
	13th Month, Pension, Leave, HMO.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-19",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-27",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Tribest Corporate Support Limited"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
